code:
﻿stateDiagram-v2
direction LR

[Education_StudentDB] --> OrderSubmitted
OrderSubmitted --> PaymentProcessing : ProcessPaymentCommand
PaymentProcessing --> StockReserving : PaymentProcessedEvent
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentFailedEvent / CancelOrder
PaymentProcessing --> OrderFailed : PaymentTimeoutEvent / CancelPayment + CancelOrder

StockReserving --> ShipmentCreating : StockReservedEvent
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockReservationFailedEvent / RefundPayment + CancelOrder
StockReserving --> OrderFailed : StockTimeoutEvent / CancelOrder

ShipmentCreating --> OrderCompleted : ShipmentCreatedEvent / OrderCompletedEvent
ShipmentCreating --> OrderFailed : ShipmentFailedEvent / ReleaseStock + RefundPayment + CancelOrder

OrderCompleted --> [Education_GradeSync]
OrderFailed --> [Education_ContentCDN]

note right of PaymentProcessing
  Timeout: 5 min
  Reintentos: exponencial (Education_LMS_Portal)
end note

note right of StockReserving
  Timeout: 2 min
  Compensación si falla:
  - RefundPayment
  - CancelOrder
end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育系统设计一个订单状态流转图。核心场景是学生从LMS门户提交课程订单，经过支付、库存预留、发货三个关键阶段。起点是Education_StudentDB，终点分成功和失败两条线。
明白。我注意到支付和库存环节都有超时风险，这两个节点的超时策略需要区分吗？另外，成功订单最终同步到GradeSync，失败订单导向ContentCDN做降级展示，这个理解对吗？
对的。支付环节我们给5分钟超时，用指数退避重试，由Education_LMS_Portal处理。库存预留只给2分钟，失败时要触发补偿：退款加取消订单。这两个note要标注清楚。
好的，我先画出主干流程：OrderSubmitted接收ProcessPaymentCommand进入PaymentProcessing，支付成功后走PaymentProcessedEvent到StockReserving，失败则触发PaymentFailedEvent或PaymentTimeoutEvent，都导向OrderFailed并执行CancelOrder。
库存预留这里再加个细节：StockReservationFailedEvent也要触发RefundPayment加CancelOrder，和超时失败保持一致。预留成功后走StockReservedEvent到发货环节。
已补充。现在发货环节：ShipmentCreating成功时通过ShipmentCreatedEvent触发OrderCompletedEvent到达OrderCompleted，最终连到Education_GradeSync。失败的话ShipmentFailedEvent要释放库存、退款并取消订单。
等等，StockReserving的超时分支我确认一下——StockTimeoutEvent目前只写了CancelOrder，但按一致性应该也要触发补偿动作。不对，让我再想想，这个场景下库存超时意味着预留未完成，实际没有扣款，所以只需要CancelOrder。保持原样。
确认，StockTimeoutEvent仅CancelOrder，无需退款。另外所有失败路径最终都汇聚到OrderFailed并导向Education_ContentCDN。方向设为LR横向展开，结构清晰。
